name: multi-head-selector
description: Selector policy for floorplan_checker. Balances unexplored architecture points, stability rechecks, and selective continuation of promising CV runs.

new_point.description: Try a fresh architecture or loss-weight combination near the current frontier gap.

seed_recheck.description: Repeat a promising run with another seed to estimate cross-run stability.

continue_branch.description: Continue a strong candidate from checkpoint with a policy-approved delta such as lr_decay or capacity increase.

eval_upgrade.description: Upgrade evaluation strictness for a candidate that looks plateaued under the current benchmark.

skip_dominated.description: Explicitly mark dominated regions so the selector avoids wasting further budget there.
